tasks.name: Add statistics configuration
tasks.purpose: Define 4 stat items (value, suffix, label) for the statistics section, enabling easy content updates

constraints: Add statistics section after features section in config object
Define StatItem interface with value (number), suffix (string), label (string)
Use exact values: 2000 (Professionals), 50000 (Presentations), 4.9 (Rating), 85 (Satisfaction)

tasks.input_state: homepage-content.config.ts exists with hero, sticky, features, testimonials, essentialReads, pricing sections
tasks.output_state: statistics section added to config with 4 stat items and TypeScript interface
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Config contains statistics object with stats array of 4 items, each with value/suffix/label

tasks.name: Create statistics section component
tasks.purpose: Build client component with responsive grid, count-up animation, staggered fade-in, and accent-colored numbers

constraints: Must use 'use client' directive
Must import motion from 'motion/react'
Must use useCountUp hook from I1 for number animation
Must wrap section with AnimateOnScroll from I1
Responsive grid: grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4
Accent color: text-[#24a9e0] for numbers
Use Framer Motion containerVariants/itemVariants with whileInView and staggerChildren
Numbers formatted with toLocaleString() for locale-aware separators
Follow existing component spacing patterns from page.tsx (componentSpacing.stack)

tasks.input_state: Config has statistics data, useCountUp hook and AnimateOnScroll exist from I1, motion package available
tasks.output_state: home-statistics-section.tsx component renders 4 stat blocks with count-up animation and staggered fade-in
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Component exists with responsive grid, 4 stat blocks using useCountUp, Framer Motion stagger animation, accent-colored numbers, and config-driven content

dependencies.notes: Requires useCountUp hook and AnimateOnScroll from I1 (feature-level dependency enforced by orchestrator)

tasks.name: Wire statistics section to homepage
tasks.purpose: Integrate statistics section into homepage page.tsx after Logo Cloud section with Suspense boundary

constraints: Place section after Logo Cloud (line ~129) and before Sticky Scroll Features
Use same container/spacing pattern as other sections (containerBase, widths.content, spacing.section)
Wrap in Suspense with appropriate fallback
Import component at top of file with other component imports

tasks.input_state: home-statistics-section.tsx component exists, page.tsx has Logo Cloud section at ~line 119-129
tasks.output_state: Statistics section appears on homepage after Logo Cloud with Suspense boundary
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Statistics section integrated after Logo Cloud in page.tsx with proper spacing and Suspense wrapper
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'HomeStatisticsSection' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx && grep -B5 'HomeStatisticsSection' apps/web/app/\(marketing\)/page.tsx | grep -q 'Logo Cloud'

tasks.name: Validate statistics section implementation
tasks.purpose: Run typecheck, lint, and verify visual rendering to ensure quality gates pass

constraints: Must run pnpm typecheck and pass without errors
Must run pnpm lint and pass without errors
Must visually verify section renders on homepage
Must verify count-up animation triggers on scroll
Must verify staggered fade-in animation works
Must verify responsive grid (test at mobile, tablet, desktop breakpoints)

tasks.input_state: All files created/modified, statistics section integrated into homepage
tasks.output_state: Typecheck passes, lint passes, visual verification complete
tasks.acceptance_criterion: pnpm typecheck passes, pnpm lint passes, section renders correctly with animations
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && echo 'Visual verification: Check http://localhost:3000 for statistics section after Logo Cloud'
